configuration.name: Scenario: Active Term Loan - Relationship Section - Loan Details

option.name: NAME_FILTER
option.value: ^Active Term Loan \- Relationship Section \- Loan Details$

option.name: PROGRAM_PARAMETERS
option.value: --plugin org.jetbrains.plugins.cucumber.java.run.CucumberJvm5SMFormatter --name "^Active Term Loan \- Relationship Section \- Loan Details$"

option.name: SUGGESTED_NAME
option.value: Scenario: Active Term Loan - Relationship Section - Loan Details
